rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §33.0811 governs school district absences for extracurricular activities. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 33.0811. SCHOOL DISTRICT POLICY ON ABSENCES TO PARTICIPATE IN EXTRACURRICULAR ACTIVITIES.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this extracurricular-attendance statute.
